review_text: Zero empathy from the lead attorney. My questions were dismissed and I felt talked down to throughout the process.
The settlement offer was accepted without our explicit approval. We only found out after the fact.
I was billed for a consultation that I was told would be complimentary. The discrepancy was never adequately explained.
Our files were lost during an office move and the firm showed little urgency in reconstructing them.
owner_response: We deeply apologize. File integrity is a fundamental obligation and we failed you. This has been escalated internally.

review_text: Our family trust was drafted with an error that we only discovered independently. The firm showed no urgency to correct it.
Responsive and thorough during our commercial lease negotiation. Would engage the firm again without hesitation.
The team understood the nuances of our industry-specific compliance issue immediately. Saved us significant time.
owner_response: Thank you. We enjoy working on complex matters with clients who are deeply engaged in the details.

review_text: Handled our landlord-tenant matter efficiently and with clear advice at each step.
Our personal injury claim moved faster than expected. The attorney explained every decision before acting.
The firm was straightforward about what our case was and was not worth pursuing. I appreciated the honesty.
owner_response: We believe honest counsel serves our clients best even when it is not what they hoped to hear.

review_text: Reasonable fees and good communication throughout our employment contract review.
Needed help with a time-sensitive NDG and the team turned it around within 24 hours. Exactly what we needed.
owner_response: Time-sensitive matters are something our team takes seriously. Glad we could help.

review_text: Good overall experience with our business formation. Would appreciate a follow-up checklist of annual compliance items.
The firm navigated a complex multi-party dispute with calm and clear strategy. All parties reached agreement.
Follow-up after our case closed was appreciated. It showed the firm cared about more than just the billable hours.
owner_response: Staying connected with clients after a matter closes matters to us. Thank you for noticing.

review_text: Staff went out of their way to accommodate our schedule during a demanding period. Small thing but it meant a lot.
Legal fees were reasonable and fully explained upfront. No surprises on the final invoice.
owner_response: Transparent billing is a core commitment. Thank you for highlighting it.

review_text: The partner assigned to our acquisition was accessible and decisive. Exactly what the transaction required.
Minor miscommunication early in the engagement was resolved quickly. Good recovery and strong finish.
owner_response: We appreciate you noting that. How a team responds to early bumps matters as much as the start.
